query: My prompt cache hit rate just dropped from 90% to 30%. Why?
expected_behavior: Names a mid-session edit to a CLAUDE.md file as one plausible cause (the cached prefix invalidates when its content changes)
Names dynamic content leaking into the cached prefix — e.g., timestamps, run IDs, or per-session identifiers — as a plausible cause
Recommends inspecting recent changes to the cached prefix (the CLAUDE.md hierarchy or SessionStart hook output) to find the source of the drift
